context: Tests whether the agent corrects current Core ML Swift integration APIs and availability without crossing into model-conversion guidance.

checklist.name: Stateless prediction
checklist.description: States that ordinary stateless `MLModel.prediction(from:)` calls are synchronous and avoids `await` on those calls.

checklist.name: Async loading availability
checklist.description: Uses `MLModel.load(contentsOf:configuration:)` for asynchronous model loading and notes iOS 15+ availability.

checklist.name: Batch prediction label
checklist.description: Uses `predictions(fromBatch:)` for no-options batch prediction and reserves `predictions(from:options:)` for the options overload.

checklist.name: Runtime compilation availability
checklist.description: If runtime compilation is discussed, notes that async `MLModel.compileModel(at:)` is iOS 16+ and avoids recompiling on every launch.

checklist.name: Async prediction nuance
checklist.description: Rejects iOS 17 stateless async prediction and, if async prediction is mentioned, scopes it to iOS 18+ stateful prediction with `MLState`.

checklist.name: Integration boundary
checklist.description: Stays focused on Swift Core ML app integration instead of Python-side conversion, quantization, or framework selection.
